articles.title: Genealogical Lesson Boos
articles.notes: Searched all 4 provided PDF page images (743, 744, 745, 746) but could not locate any article titled 'Genealogical Lesson Boos'. The pages contain advertisements for various businesses including Utah-Idaho Sugar, Star Printing Co., Thomas Studio, Deseret News Book Store, and other Salt Lake City establishments, plus the magazine contents page and a poem titled 'Similitude'. The article may be on a different page not included in these images.
